description: The GizmoLink component handles the Interaction and connection of every Gizmo with their respective target. This is usually invisible to users and their inspectors, but upon opening a new inspector on a target of a Gizmo it appears. It is unknown if this is a bug. This component along with Gizmos do not save with items but Gizmos can save with a world.

fields._gizmo: The Gizmo this is making a Link for.
fields._type: The C# Type of what this is targeting.

usage: Not used directly by the user.
